title: Norwegian Salmon Wrap
description: Delicate Norwegian salmon fillet, carefully wrapped in a crunchy wrap with fresh herbs and a hint of lemon.
instructions: Season the salmon fillet with salt and pepper.
Place the salmon on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the mayonnaise, lemon juice, and chopped dill in a small bowl.
Warm the large wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the mayonnaise mixture on the wrap, followed by a cooked salmon fillet.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
